title: podman container rm --auto-named
body:
It would be cool if there was a command:

```
podman container rm --auto-named
```

which removed all containers that were automatically assigned their names (these names like `strange_gagarin`, `elegant_colden`, `musing_lamport` and so).

Those are usually created as a result of experimentation (often as a result of forgetting `--rm` to `run`) and it's basically never my intention to keep them around for more than a few minutes.  In contrast, the containers that I explicitly assigned a name to are ones that I tend to want to keep.

This might be supported by a label automatically being set on automatically-named containers.
